original_hypothesis.title: setLoopAddresses Accepts Zero Addresses and Is Irreversible - Potential Permanent Contract Bricking
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: setLoopAddresses has no zero-address validation for _loopAddress or _vaultAddress. It sets loopActivation = block.timestamp, which prevents re-calling (onlyBeforeDate(loopActivation) fails in same or later block). If the owner accidentally sets address(0) for lpETH, convertAllETH will attempt lpETH.deposit{value: totalBalance}(address(this)) on address(0), which will revert. Users can only withdraw during the grace period. If that window passes, funds are locked until emergency mode is enabled.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: No input validation on critical address parameters in a one-time-call function. The loopActivation = block.timestamp at line 309 prevents correction.

proof_of_signal.pattern: lpETH = ILpETH(_loopAddress); no require(_loopAddress != address(0)); loopActivation = uint32(block.timestamp) prevents re-calling

preconditions: Owner calls setLoopAddresses with address(0) for _loopAddress or _vaultAddress
No mechanism to correct after the call

initial_operational_evidence.suspicious_workflow: No address(0) check; loopActivation reset prevents re-calling; one-shot function

operational_questions: Can emergency mode withdrawal recover all funds if lpETH is address(0)?
Would ETH depositors still be blocked by UseClaimInstead after convertAllETH fails?
Is there any other recovery path?
validation_requirements: Verify emergency mode is sufficient fallback

preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_1: Owner accidentally (or maliciously) sets lpETH to address(0)
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_2: convertAllETH attempts to call address(0).deposit{value:...} - reverts
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_3: Grace period expires; users who didn't withdraw are stuck
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_4: Only recovery: owner enables emergencyMode for non-ETH withdrawals; ETH withdrawals work pre-startClaimDate

potential_operational_impact.operational_disruption: Conversion blocked; deposits locked until emergency withdrawal
potential_operational_impact.recovery_difficulty: Recoverable via emergency mode (for both ETH and non-ETH before startClaimDate)

investigation_priorities.on_chain_signals: lpETH or lpETHVault set to address(0)

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
